title: New Custom Music Client Side Player
description: A client-side music player for playing and managing custom music from resource packs.
body:
# New Custom Music Client-Side Player

A client-side Minecraft music player for custom music from resource packs.

Play single tracks, build playlists, reorder songs, control playback with keybinds, and manage music with commands — all directly in-game!

This mod does **not** include any music by default. You must provide your own tracks through resource packs. Here is a resource pack if you want to try [it](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/utdr-music-pack).

![Mod's main screen, you can access mod links, view tips and select play mode here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3d6a78828f6118e66ccb0c0c57b62224aaa22b5_0.webp)

## Features

- Single-track playback with optional looping  
- Playlist creation, editing, renaming, deletion, and playback  
- Namespace-based track browsing  
- Playlist preview and starting-track selection  
- Keybinds for volume and track control  
- Commands for playback and playlist management  
- Client-side only  
  
## Screenshots & Feature Preview  
![Single Track Mode screen showing custom music tracks from the selected namespace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25fc16f6be8820ee7dbe7c7cb5030d88f6baf253_0.webp)
![Playlist management screen showing existing playlists and playlist actions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d135c8acc361ebdd06adab05019db404d8e45aa0_0.webp)
![Playlist playback configuration screen with playlist preview, start index, loop options, and start button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3cb3c06a6caadfc2a366e7420a0f7af5a924cf9_0.webp)

## Learn More

For setup instructions, command syntax, and detailed usage examples, please visit [the project wiki](https://github.com/8BitsOneByte/NewCustomMusicClientSidePlayer/wiki).
